children.label: A
children.text: are located in county seats, or

children.label: B

children.heading: Designated depositary of the United States
children.label: 2 Designated depositary of the United States
children.text: Any designated depositary of the United States a suitable quantity of adhesive stamps to be kept on sale by such designated depositary.
